channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3 dirty (moldy?) mattresses flytipped on pavement at top of Ruskin Road. Blocking half of pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Someone has fly-tipped three dirty, possibly moldy mattresses on the footpath at the top of Ruskin Road. The mattresses were first noticed on Friday 19th June 2026. It is blocking half of the pavement, possibly blocking the path of those using prams or accessibility/mobility aids.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ruskin Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 19th June
item.description:
Multiple items dumped on pavement for last few weeks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wattisfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats need to be fixed asap, 19th June
item.description:
The rats infestation is unsafe in this area, they literally jump out on you. This has been reported multiple times by different people and it was never fixed. Can someone look into this URGENTLY?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Blocking the pavement.

item.title: Horrible graffiti ruining conservation area, 19th June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Way, Hackney, London

item.title: Overhanging branches, dead branches, 19th June
item.description:
This tree is overgrown in some areas and has others that are dead and bare. To my knowledge it has not been trimmed in years and has been looking increasingly unhealthy in recent months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rye Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30-36 Honiton Road NW6 6QD, 19th June
item.description:
As shown on pictures, dead leaves and rubbish need sweeping and removing please. Many thanks !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Air Conditioner Unit, 19th June
item.description:
This air conditioner unit and the top of the glass table has been outside my flat for two weeks. It is outside Block C, Guinness Court. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirby Grove, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 26-28 Honiton Rd NW6 6QD, 19th June
item.description:
Would you please kindly sweep leaves and collect rubbish on pavement and street gutters. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White van fly tipping, 19th June
item.description:
I saw the large white van come up Albert Rd while I was parking outside my house The van turned into Parkhurst Rd and pulled up on the pavement, a man in work clothes got out and dumped the large tank on the pavement, got back in and drove off. The object then rolled into the rd. a man parked on opposite side of the rd got these films from his dash cam, I noted the registration number as B868 2AG, at 17.45 pm. I believe they must have been working in Albert Rd. Please try to prosecute this person as fly tipping of rubbish is becoming a problem locally, mainly from builders. Let me know how you get on. Thanks. I have small videos on WhatsApp demonstrating more clearly the whole incident if you want them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Parkhurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cushions and rubbish edge of pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Cushions and rubbish edge road south side edge pavement where juts out into road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheringham Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: NW6 6QD in front of 24 Honiton Road, 19th June
item.description:
Rubbish tree branches and leaves have accumulated for weeks and need to be swept and collected please. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London

item.title: Tree branches are overhanging onto my driveway and are close to the paving outside my property., 19th June
item.description:
I would like to report that the tree located outside my property has become overgrown and its branches are extending over my driveway. The branches are now very close to, and appear to be touching, the paving area. I am concerned that continued growth could cause damage to the paving and make access to the driveway more difficult. Please could the tree be inspected and, if necessary, pruned back. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 4 Donaldson Road, 19th June
item.description:
Also gulleys on the road also need sweeping of twigs . Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
